things.name: Tallinn Old Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval Hanseatic old town, one of the best-preserved in Europe

things.name: Toompea Castle & Alexander Nevsky Cathedral
things.description: Parliament hill with an onion-domed Russian Orthodox cathedral and city views

things.name: Town Hall Square (Raekoja plats)
things.description: Gothic town hall and medieval square surrounded by merchant houses and cafes

things.name: Kumu Art Museum
things.description: Estonia's largest museum of Estonian and world art in a striking contemporary building

things.name: Kadriorg Palace & Park
things.description: Baroque palace built by Peter the Great with a Russian-influenced formal garden

things.name: Seaplane Harbour Museum
things.description: Outstanding maritime museum in a restored seaplane hangar with a Soviet submarine

things.name: Great Guild Hall
things.description: 15th-century merchant hall housing the Estonian History Museum

things.name: Tallinn Song Festival Grounds
things.description: Massive outdoor amphitheatre for the UNESCO Estonian Song Festival tradition

things.name: Pirita Convent Ruins
things.description: Haunting 15th-century ruins of the largest convent in medieval Livonia

things.name: Lennusadam Seaplane Harbour
things.description: World's largest and best-preserved triploid concrete seaplane hangars
